cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, Mr. Jitendra Singh, sir. How are you today?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: I'm fine, thank you. Who is this?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: My name is Rohan, and I'm calling from Central Bank of India, sir. We've had a change in the interest rate for your floating-rate home loan.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Oh, okay. What's the new rate, ji?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: The new rate is 8.5% per annum, as per the RBI's new repo rate, sir. This change will be effective from the 1st of next month.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, that's a bit higher than before. Will it affect my EMI, thik hai?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, Mr. Singh, there will be a slight increase in your EMI. But don't worry, it's a minimal change, haan. We can discuss the details if you'd like.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, that sounds fine. What's the new EMI amount?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Let me just check that for you, sir. (pause) Yes, your new EMI will be approximately Rs. 35,500.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 69s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: An agent from a bank ([BANK_NAME]) calls to inform a customer that the interest rate on their floating-rate home loan has been revised as per the RBI's new repo rate.
